author: .fjl
content:
So about this. I have merged the initial implemenation of 8282 contracts into sys-asm (with the fee-per-tx logic).

There is a PR here that implements loading of target/max from the calldata: https://github.com/ethereum/sys-asm/pull/48
However, this requires changes in the ELs to pass those parameters. I don't think it's a good idea to make this optional, we don't want to add 'sleeper' functionality into the system call.
